name: Quick Black Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup Dry black beans (rinsed and soaked)
16 ounce Canned peeled tomatoes (chopped; juice reserved)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and add them to a soup pot with enough cold water to cover by a couple of inches.
2. Bring to a boil and skim off the foam that rises to the surface.
3. Add the onions and garlic, then lower the heat.
4. Cook until the onions are soft (about 15 minutes).
5. Add the tomatoes and their juice, the pureed chiles, and half the cilantro; lightly salt.
6. Simmer until the beans are tender (an hour or so). Stir occasionally while cooking.
7. When done, taste for salt, stir in the remaining cilantro, and garnish as desired.
